title: Create a Simple Blog Post Template

source.module: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

topicTags: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

content.problemStatement:
In this worked-out example, we'll create a simple blog post template using Django. \
We'll use the concepts we've learned about Django templates, views, and URL configuration to display a blog post.

Check out the folder structure below:
```python
blog_project/
│
├── blog_app/
│   ├── views.py
